description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release that triggers on push events with any tag. The workflow should have three jobs: create-release, build-binaries, and build-release. The create-release job checks out the repository, generates release notes, extracts the version from the tag, and creates a draft GitHub release. The build-binaries job uses a reusable workflow to build binaries. The build-release job checks out the repository, installs dependencies, configures and builds the project, and uploads the resulting archives to the release.
